AL selected human sequences expression analysis Report

Emmanuel Cazottes

28 January, 2026

This notebook analyze the expression levels of the most and least selected human K562 sequences by AL methods (top/bottom 10%) compared to random selection and the AL pool. K562 MPRA data from Gosai et al 2024 are used to annotate expression of selected sequences.

Only the K562 data was used to train the model so the HepG2 and SKNHSH columns are removed

Data import and preprocessing

Sequences expression as measured in K562 MPRA

mpra = read.table("reference/41586_2024_8070_MOESM4_ESM.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
mpra = mpra[,-c(2,3,4,5,length(mpra))] #Remove the columns I won't use
mpra = mpra[,c(1,2,5)] #Keeping the K562 related columns

Load the sequence data

load.sequences = function(seq.tab){
  seq = read.table(seq.tab, header = F, sep = "\t", col.names = c("IDs", "sequence","method"))
  seq = seq[,-2]
  return(seq)
}

alPool = load.sequences("sequences/pool.tsv")
alPool$rounds = "AL pool"
alPool$method = "AL pool"
alPool$al.method = "AL pool"

tnb = load.sequences("sequences/human_top_n_bottom_10.tsv")
tnb[grep("1x60", tnb$method),"rounds"] = "1x60k"
tnb[grep("1x60", tnb$method,invert = T),"rounds"] = "3x20k"
tnb[grep("uncertainty_((1x60)|(3x20))_bottom.*", tnb$method),"al.method"] = "Least uncertain"
tnb[grep("uncertainty_((1x60)|(3x20))_top.*", tnb$method),"al.method"] = "Most uncertain"
tnb[grep("diversity_((1x60)|(3x20))_bottom.*", tnb$method),"al.method"] = "Least diverse"
tnb[grep("diversity_((1x60)|(3x20))_top.*", tnb$method),"al.method"] = "Most diverse"

Merge sequence ID with expression values

Merge the mpra data with the sequence data

tnb.mpra = merge(tnb, mpra,by="IDs")
alPool.mpra = merge(alPool, mpra, by="IDs")

#Random selection
rnd.mpra = alPool.mpra[sample(seq(1,nrow(alPool.mpra),1),100000),]
rnd.mpra$method = "Random selection"
rnd.mpra$rounds = "Random selection"
rnd.mpra$al.method = "Random selection"

Bind everything together for plotting

tnb.mpra.3x20 = subset(tnb.mpra, rounds=="3x20k")
tnb.mpra.1x60 = subset(tnb.mpra, rounds=="1x60k")
seq.mpra.3x20 = rbind( tnb.mpra.3x20, rnd.mpra, alPool.mpra)
seq.mpra.1x60 = rbind(tnb.mpra.1x60, rnd.mpra, alPool.mpra)

#Levels for plotting
seq.mpra.3x20$al.method = factor(seq.mpra.3x20$al.method, levels = c("AL pool", "Random selection",  "Least uncertain","Most uncertain","Least diverse","Most diverse"))
seq.mpra.1x60$al.method = factor(seq.mpra.1x60$al.method, levels = c("AL pool", "Random selection",  "Least uncertain","Most uncertain","Least diverse","Most diverse"))

Test statistical differences between the groups

# compute the Mann-Whitney pvalue
mannWhitneyTest = function(data){
  df.pval = map_dfr(levels(data$al.method), function(level){
  group1 = subset(data, al.method==level)$K562_log2FC
  group2 = subset(data, al.method=="AL pool")$K562_log2FC
  
  mwt = wilcox.test(group1, group2)
  
  data.frame(al.method=level,
             pvalue=signif(mwt$p.value, digits = 2),
             statistic=mwt$statistic)
  })
  
  df.pval$pvalue = ifelse((df.pval$pvalue==0 | df.pval$pvalue<=2.2e-16),"p < 2.2e-16", paste0("p = ",df.pval$pvalue)) #R reports 0 because the pvalue is smaller than R's standard floating-point precision

  return(df.pval)
  }
pval60k = mannWhitneyTest(seq.mpra.1x60)
pval60k$y.axis = 10
pval3x20 = mannWhitneyTest(seq.mpra.3x20)
pval3x20$y.axis = 10

Plots

boxplot.fc.3x20 = ggplot(seq.mpra.3x20 , aes(x=al.method, y=K562_log2FC))+
  geom_violin(width=1.25, adjust=3)+  
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1,outliers=F)+
    geom_text(data = pval3x20, aes(x=al.method,y=y.axis, label = pvalue),size = 3)+
  xlab("")+
  ylab("log2(FC K562)")+
  ggtitle("K562 - 3x20")+
    theme(aspect.ratio = c(0.85/1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "mm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size=7), axis.title = element_text(size=10))

boxplot.fc.1x60 = ggplot(seq.mpra.1x60 , aes(x=al.method, y=K562_log2FC))+
  geom_violin(width=1.25, adjust=3)+  
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1,outliers=F)+
    geom_text(data = pval60k, aes(x=al.method,y=y.axis, label = pvalue),size = 3)+
  xlab("")+
  ylab("log2(FC K562)")+
    ggtitle("K562 - 1x60")+
    theme(aspect.ratio = c(0.85/1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "mm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size=7), axis.title = element_text(size=10))
print(boxplot.fc.3x20)

Selected sequences TFBS analysis 

print(boxplot.fc.1x60)

Selected sequences TFBS analysis
